creator: erj@freebsd.org
text:
So it looks like the hash is being used to index into the HLUT, but the resulting queue is then mod 16.

To illustrate:

HLUT(45): 0x24252627 (where bits 21:16 contain LUT entry 4*45+2) and a packet received on queue 5 has a hash of 0xa33600b6 in its RX descriptor. According to the HLUT, it should really have gone to queue 37.

This is really odd.
